name: Password Generation and Security Guide
description: Generate a secure random password using Python and compile current password security best practices from web research into a guide file

tasks.name: Generate Random Password
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to generate a random 16-character password. Write Python code using the 'secrets' module and 'string' module. The password must contain uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, and special characters (!@#$%^&*). Output ONLY the generated password string itself on a single line, nothing else. Example output format: 'aB3!xY7@qW9#mN2$'
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains exactly one 16-character string with uppercase, lowercase, digits, and special characters

tasks.name: Search Password Security Best Practices
tasks.description: You MUST call web_search with the query 'password security best practices 2026'. Output the FULL raw search results verbatim including all URLs, titles, and snippets. Do NOT summarize as 'results were found' — downstream tasks need the actual data with specific security recommendations. Output format: List each result with its URL, title, and complete snippet text.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains at least 3 URLs starting with https:// and their associated text snippets containing password security recommendations

tasks.name: Write Password Guide File
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to create the file 'password_guide.txt'. Use the exact password string from task_001 output and the search results from task_002 output. File content structure: Line 1: 'Generated Password:' Line 2: [paste exact password from task_001] Line 3: blank Line 4: 'Password Security Best Practices:' Line 5+: Extract 5-8 specific security tips from task_002 search snippets and format as bulleted list with '- ' prefix. Do NOT invent tips - only use information present in task_002 output.
tasks.success_criteria: File password_guide.txt exists and contains the 16-character password from task_001 and at least 5 security tips extracted from task_002 search results
